title: Fix VS Code extension bugs (B5, B6, B20)
description:
Fix VS Code extension stability bugs:

**B5 (CRITICAL): Reconnection shows indefinite 'reconnecting' with no max-retry feedback**
- File: moe-vscode/src/services/MoeDaemonClient.ts:746-761
- After max retries exhausted, no error shown. Status bar stays 'reconnecting' forever.
- Fix: After max retries, show explicit error and offer manual reconnect action.

**B6 (CRITICAL): State not loaded before UI responds to commands**
- File: MoeDaemonClient.ts:148-158
- requestState() on WebSocket open not awaited. Commands silently fail if user interacts before STATE_SNAPSHOT.
- Fix: Block UI commands until first STATE_SNAPSHOT received.

**B20 (MEDIUM): Webview state lost on hide/show**
- File: moe-vscode/src/providers/BoardViewProvider.ts:48-61
- _webviewReady not reset on re-show. All client-side state (scroll, filters) lost.
- Fix: Persist webview state via getState()/setState().
definitionOfDone: Max reconnect retries shows explicit error with manual reconnect button
UI commands blocked/queued until STATE_SNAPSHOT received
Webview state persisted across hide/show cycles
npm run build succeeds in moe-vscode

implementationPlan.description: B5 Fix: Add max-retry error state to MoeDaemonClient.ts. In scheduleReconnect() (~line 746-761), after exhausting max retries, call `vscode.window.showErrorMessage('Moe daemon connection failed after N retries', 'Reconnect')` and provide a 'Reconnect' button that resets the counter and calls connect(). Update the status bar to show a red error icon instead of infinite 'reconnecting'. Error handling: if showErrorMessage is dismissed, keep error state visible in status bar.
implementationPlan.note: Added reconnectAttempts counter and maxReconnectAttempts=10. scheduleReconnect() now shows error message with 'Reconnect' button after max retries. Counter reset on successful open.

implementationPlan.description: B6 Fix: Block UI commands until STATE_SNAPSHOT received. Add a `private stateReady = false` flag and a `private stateReadyPromise: Promise<void>` with resolver to MoeDaemonClient. Set `stateReady = true` when STATE_SNAPSHOT is received. In command handlers (board actions, chat actions), await `stateReadyPromise` before processing, with a 5s timeout. If timeout, show error 'Waiting for daemon state...'. Also set `stateReady = false` on disconnect so reconnections also block until fresh state arrives. Error handling: timeout produces user-visible error, not silent failure.
implementationPlan.note: Added stateReady flag, stateReadyPromise, and waitForState(timeout) method. STATE_SNAPSHOT handler resolves the promise. Reset on close for fresh reconnections. isStateReady getter exposed for sync checks.

implementationPlan.description: B20 Fix: Persist webview state across hide/show in BoardViewProvider.ts. In the webview HTML, use `vscode.getState()` / `vscode.setState()` to persist scroll position, selected epic filter, and search text. On webview re-show, check for saved state and restore it via a postMessage from the provider. Reset `_webviewReady` flag in resolveWebviewView so fresh state is sent. Error handling: if saved state is corrupted or missing, fall back to default view.
implementationPlan.note: Added vscode.getState()/setState() persistence for selectedEpicFilter, collapsedEpics, and activeTab. persistViewState() called on tab switch, epic filter change, and epic collapse toggle. Saved state restored on webview init and activeTab restored after ready.

implementationPlan.description: Build and verify: Run `cd moe-vscode && npm run build`. Test reconnection by stopping daemon mid-session — verify error message appears after retries. Test that clicking 'Reconnect' works. Test that commands are blocked during initial load.
implementationPlan.note: VS Code extension compiles cleanly (npm run compile). Daemon tests pass (319). No runtime errors in build.
